title: Helping you to reach the truth that you already have inside you

services.description: Choose an option you prefer and text me in Telegram or WhatsApp

general.1: How your Reality will look like during this period in general
general.2: What this period is favourable for
general.6: How will my relationships with *name* change during this time?
general.7: How will my financial situation look like?

harmony.1: How your reality looks like now
harmony.2: What the reason of your current mental state is
harmony.3: What can make you feel better
harmony.4: How the best option of your reality looks like
harmony.5: What you should do to start living the best option of reality

strength.1: What your energy is right now
strength.3: Which skills will help you the most on your current life path
strength.5: What you can achieve developing them

finance.title2: HOW TO IMPROVE YOUR FINANCIAL SITUATION
finance.2: What your main mental blocks are that don’t let you improve your financial situation
finance.3: External factors that negatively affect your financial situation
finance.4: What can help you to attract money into your life
finance.5: How huge can be the difference in your financial situation when you start working on it

love1.title3: Checking your compatibility with a person you know
love1.1: His personality. what you should know about him
love1.3: How he sees you and your relationship now
love1.4: Why this person appeared in your life(what your karmic lessons are)
love1.5: How your relationships will be developing

love2.title3: if there are any misunderstandings between you
love2.1: The situation in your couple right now
love2.3: The real reason of your problems and misunderstandings
love2.4: What you can do to make the situation better
love2.5: What this person will bring to you and how your relationships will be developing

nav-video-call.title: ONE HOUR OF VIDEOCALL = UNLIMITED AMOUNT OF QUESTIONS
nav-video-call.1: Videocall is a perfect format for those who feel the need to speak up about their situation, since it gives you the opportunity to ask way more questions than you have prepared, as they will be appearing during the talk. I am interested in helping you to leave satisfied and get the answers on your questions.
nav-video-call.2: I recommend you to prepare your questions beforehand and message me describing your situation, so we can save our time

nav-your-questions.suggestion:
Please read more information here
(what types of questions I don’t work with & what information I need from you)

nav-quick-message.title: Something you should know on your current life path
nav-quick-message.1:
One Card – a message from your Higher Self

One Card – a message from Higher Powers
nav-quick-message.2: From 5 to 10 minutes voice message from me

nav-compatibility-astro1.title2: Checking a compatibility with your partner using your astrological charts (date of birth, exact place of birth and exact time of birth needed)
nav-compatibility-astro1.1: analysis of two natal charts: needs, interests and values that each of you have, what type of partner you like and what type of partner you choose to marry
nav-compatibility-astro1.2: checking a compatibility: what you have in common (which statements, interests, values you have the same), and what your differences are
nav-compatibility-astro1.3: which spheres of life you “highlight” for each other and how it happens
nav-compatibility-astro1.4: describing the way you change around your partner and the way your partner changes around you

nav-compatibility-astro2.1: everything that is included in Standard Synastry
nav-compatibility-astro2.2: karmic lessons in your couple: how you were connected in your past lives and what impact it has on you now
nav-compatibility-astro2.3: the reason you have met in this life (which scenarios you must go through together and why)

nav-important.disclaimer: TYPES OF QUESTIONS I DON’T WORK WITH:
nav-important.input: WHAT INFORMATION I NEED FROM YOU:

nav-conclusion.1: There are multiple options of future, not just one. Thanks to Tarot we can see what’s most likely going to happen and we can get some guidance on how to get to Reality that we want.
nav-conclusion.2: All of the answers are already inside you: this is basically a work with your subconscious. I help you to understand yourself and the situation better.
nav-conclusion.the-end: YOU ARE THE CREATOR OF YOUR LIFE
